title: Pan Aroma Red Decorative Holder & Scented Candle, Apple & Cinnamon, 85G
features: WELCOMING HOME FRAGRANCE: Pan Aroma Decorative Scented Candles, a quick, effective way to instantly change the ambience in a room by adding flickering candle light and fragrance. Light the wick and the candle will gently diffuse an autumnal sweet & spicy apple & cinnamon fragrance creating a welcoming scent to any room in the home.

INSTANT FRAGRANCE: A quick, effective way to instantly change the atmosphere in a room by adding flickering candle light and fragrance. The scent will remain in the room after the candle flame has extinguished

GIFT FOR ALL OCCASIONS: Perfect gift, a Pan Aroma decorative scented candle is a long lasting gift, when the candle has been burnt, the container can be cleaned and used as a candle holder or storage pot
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Scent, Red Berry. Colour, Red,85g Decorative Candle. Warning: Never leave a burning candle unattended. Burn time: approx 26 hours.
description: Product Description Pan Aroma Decorative Scented Candles, a quick, effective way to instantly change the ambience in a room by adding flickering candle light and fragrance. Light the wick and the candle will gently diffuse a sweet & spicy apple & cinnamon fragrance creating a welcoming scent to any room in the home. The scent will remain in the room after the candle flame has extinguished. The decorative scented candle is a long lasting gift, when the candle has been burnt, the container can be cleaned and used as a candle holder or storage pot. Scent, Apple & Cinnamon. Colour, Red,85g Decorative Candle. Warning: Never leave a burning candle unattended. Safety Warning Never leave a burning candle unattended.
